title: Perform tests for quality on seeds
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform tests for quality on seeds demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare seed for testing and maintain condition and purity

pcs.text: Identify purpose of seed tests from work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose of seed tests from work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose of seed tests from work instructions.

pcs.text: Verify authenticity of seed from submitted sample documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify authenticity of seed from submitted sample documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify authenticity of seed from submitted sample documentation.

pcs.text: Verify submitted seed sample complies with condition specified for seed test and report inconsistences to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify submitted seed sample complies with condition specified for seed test and report inconsistences to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify submitted seed sample complies with condition specified for seed test and report inconsistences to supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare working test sample/s from submitted seed sample according to workplace and laboratory procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare working test sample/s from submitted seed sample according to workplace and laboratory procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare working test sample/s from submitted seed sample according to workplace and laboratory procedures.

pcs.text: Store and maintain condition and quality of seed samples for testing according to seed species, workplace procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and maintain condition and quality of seed samples for testing according to seed species, workplace procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and maintain condition and quality of seed samples for testing according to seed species, workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Implement procedures to prevent contamination of submitted sample and working samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement procedures to prevent contamination of submitted sample and working samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures to prevent contamination of submitted sample and working samples.

pcs.text: Label and record working samples according to workplace and industry standards for traceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label and record working samples according to workplace and industry standards for traceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label and record working samples according to workplace and industry standards for traceability.
